title: Contact form
intro: Use this form to request information about one of the three confirmed services. The request requires accepting the privacy policy before submission.

privacy.label: I have read and accept the privacy policy.

honeypot.label: Do not fill in this field

legalSummary: The form sends the request to david@instalberrozpe.com as the confirmed primary email.
The final tax identity and final legal text are still pending external legal review.
successMessage: Your request has been sent successfully.
errorMessage: The form could not be sent. Check the fields and try again.

validationMessages.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number or leave the field empty.
validationMessages.privacyRequired: You must accept the privacy policy.
validationMessages.honeypotFilled: The submission could not be validated.
validationMessages.genericError: The form could not be processed.
